Enterprise software and cloud automation

Professional software systems for teams operating under pressure.

RePass Cloud builds operational software, cloud tooling, and identity automation for enterprises running across Azure, AWS, Microsoft 365, and legacy business systems.

Start a conversation See proof of work
Audit-aware delivery
Enterprise-first architecture
Built in Sydney, delivered globally
Positioning

We build control layers, not brochureware.

Our work is designed for live enterprise conditions: governance requirements, identity complexity, integration boundaries, and operational support realities.

Built for real production constraints
Security and evidence from day one
Designed to reduce manual operations
Products and delivery

Product discipline plus custom implementation depth.

We deliver both flagship products and bespoke systems using the same engineering standard.

Enterprise SaaS Identity Cloud governance Workflow automation
Capabilities

Core service lines

Enterprise platform engineering

Multi-tenant software, operational control planes, and internal systems designed to survive real enterprise complexity.

Cloud tooling and governance

Automation and decision-support tooling across Azure and AWS for cost, risk, compliance, and operational consistency.

M365 identity automation

Lifecycle automation across Entra ID and Microsoft 365 covering onboarding, offboarding, access, and audit evidence.

PowerShell delivery

Production-grade modules and scripts that remove manual runbook work while preserving control, logging, and supportability.
Case studies

Proven in live environments

Enterprise identity

Microsoft 365 identity automation

Rule-driven lifecycle automation across AU and NZ brands with approvals, mailbox changes, and policy-safe access flows.

2,100 staff supported with zero daily manual IT intervention.

Microsoft 365Entra IDPowerShell
Finance operations

Workflow automation at retail scale

End-to-end processing automation across approvals, provisioning, and reconciliation for a large multi-brand business.

Eliminated a 4 FTE manual burden.

Oracle HCMWorkflowIdentity
Cloud governance

FinOps tooling across multi-cloud

Unified governance and realised-savings tracking across AWS, Azure, and GCP in one operational view.

Visibility across approximately $7M USD annual spend.

AWSAzureGCP

Insights

Recent writing

All posts
7 March 2026
Why Most Microsoft 365 Identity Automation Fails in Real Environments
Why Microsoft 365 identity automation often breaks down after the demo phase, and what organisations actually need to make access changes reliable, auditable, schedule-aware, and safe in production.
6 March 2026
Export Microsoft 365 Mailboxes, Aliases, and Sizes with PowerShell
A practical guide to connecting to Exchange Online via PowerShell and exporting a complete mailbox report including primary addresses, aliases, mailbox types, sizes, and item counts to CSV.
28 February 2026
We Are Standardizing on AOT for All Console Software
Why Repass Cloud has standardized on Native AOT for all internal CLI and distributed console tooling, covering runtime mechanics, memory behavior, musl considerations, and real-world migration trade-offs.
Lead conversation

Tell us where operations are failing. We will design the right control layer.

Software requests are usually symptoms. We work from the root operational problem and ship resilient systems.
